property.name: java.library.path

odejs\;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Program Files\Docker\Dockeresources in;C:\Program Files\Git in;D:\src lutter in;C:\Program Files (x86)\Windows Kits\10\Windows Performance Toolkit\;C:\Program Files\MySQL\MySQL Server 8.0 in;C:\Users\MSI\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python312\Scripts\;C:\Users\MSI\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python312\;C:\Users\MSI\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python313\Scripts\;C:\Users\MSI\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python313\;C:\Users\MSI\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python39\Scripts\;C:\Users\MSI\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python39\;C:\Users\MSI\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python310\Scripts\;C:\Users\MSI\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python310\;C:\Users\MSI\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python311\Scripts\;C:\Users\MSI\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python311\;C:\Program Files\MySQL\MySQL Shell 8.0 in\;C:\Users\MSI\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\MSI\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code in;C:\Users\MSI\AppData\Roaming
pm;C:\Program Files\OpenSSL-Win64 in;C:\Users\MSI\Downloads\apache-maven-3.9.10-bin\apache-maven-3.9.10 in;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-17 in;C:\Program Files\MongoDB\Server\8.0 in;C:\Program Files\MongoDB\mongosh-2.5.3-win32-x64 in;C:\Program Files\JetBrains\WebStorm 2025.1.3 in;;D:\src lutter in;C:\php;C:\Program Files\JetBrains\CLion 2025.2.4 in;C:\Users\MSI\AppData\Local\Programs\IntelliJ IDEA 2025.2.5 in;C:\Users\MSI\AppData\Local\Programs\Ollama;c:\Users\MSI\.vscode\extensions\vscjava.vscode-java-debug-0.58.5 undled\scripts

testcase.name: Employee submits a valid leave request
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Employee submits a valid leave request &amp#27;[90m# features/auth-leave_01_leave-request-lifecycle_20260326_014505.feature:7&amp#27;[0m 01:45:36.457 [main] INFO com.example.e2e.steps.ConsolidatedE2ESteps -- [OK] POST /api/auth/login -> HTTP 200 01:45:37.054 [main] INFO com.example.e2e.steps.ConsolidatedE2ESteps -- [OK] JWT token extracted: eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9... &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe Employee logs in with valid credentials&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.e2e.steps.ConsolidatedE2ESteps.theEmployeeLogsInWithValidCredentials()&amp#27;[0m 01:45:37.055 [main] INFO com.example.e2e.steps.ConsolidatedE2ESteps -- Precondition: sufficient leave balance (30+ days available) &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe Employee has sufficient leave balance&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.e2e.steps.ConsolidatedE2ESteps.theEmployeeHasSufficientLeaveBalance()&amp#27;[0m 01:45:37.110 [main] INFO com.example.e2e.steps.ConsolidatedE2ESteps -- [OK] POST /api/leave-requests/create (future date -> future date) -> HTTP 400 &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe Employee submits an annual leave request from &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"future date"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m to &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"future date"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.e2e.steps.ConsolidatedE2ESteps.theEmployeeSubmitsAnAnnualLeaveRequestFromStringToString(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m 01:45:37.111 [main] WARN com.example.e2e.steps.ConsolidatedE2ESteps -- [SKIP] Unhandled When step: the request has a valid reason &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe request has a valid reason&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.e2e.steps.ConsolidatedE2ESteps.theRequestHasAValidReason()&amp#27;[0m 01:45:37.122 [main] WARN com.example.e2e.steps.ConsolidatedE2ESteps -- Status mismatch expected=Pending actual=400 &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe leave request status is &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"Pending"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.e2e.steps.ConsolidatedE2ESteps.theLeaveRequestStatusIsString(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m

testcase.name: Employee submits without filling all required fields
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Employee submits without filling all required fields &amp#27;[90m# features/auth-leave_01_leave-request-lifecycle_20260326_014505.feature:13&amp#27;[0m 01:45:37.220 [main] INFO com.example.e2e.steps.ConsolidatedE2ESteps -- [OK] POST /api/auth/login -> HTTP 200 01:45:37.230 [main] INFO com.example.e2e.steps.ConsolidatedE2ESteps -- [OK] JWT token extracted: eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9... &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe Employee logs in with valid credentials&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.e2e.steps.ConsolidatedE2ESteps.theEmployeeLogsInWithValidCredentials()&amp#27;[0m 01:45:37.231 [main] INFO com.example.e2e.steps.ConsolidatedE2ESteps -- Precondition: sufficient leave balance (30+ days available) &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe Employee has sufficient leave balance&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.e2e.steps.ConsolidatedE2ESteps.theEmployeeHasSufficientLeaveBalance()&amp#27;[0m 01:45:37.245 [main] INFO com.example.e2e.steps.ConsolidatedE2ESteps -- Submitting leave request: 2026-06-01 -> 2026-06-05 01:45:37.284 [main] INFO com.example.e2e.steps.ConsolidatedE2ESteps -- [OK] POST /api/leave-requests/create (2026-06-01 -> 2026-06-05) -> HTTP 500 &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe Employee submits a leave request without a reason&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.e2e.steps.ConsolidatedE2ESteps.theEmployeeSubmitsALeaveRequestWithoutAReason()&amp#27;[0m 01:45:37.285 [main] INFO com.example.e2e.steps.ConsolidatedE2ESteps -- Error HTTP 500: {"timestamp":"2026-03-26","status":500,"error":"Internal Server Error","path":"/api/leave-requests/create"} &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe system displays the error &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"Request cannot be created without a reason"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.e2e.steps.ConsolidatedE2ESteps.theSystemDisplaysTheErrorString(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m

testcase.name: Employee submits overlapping with another request
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Employee submits overlapping with another request &amp#27;[90m# features/auth-leave_01_leave-request-lifecycle_20260326_014505.feature:18&amp#27;[0m 01:45:37.376 [main] INFO com.example.e2e.steps.ConsolidatedE2ESteps -- [OK] POST /api/auth/login -> HTTP 200 01:45:37.386 [main] INFO com.example.e2e.steps.ConsolidatedE2ESteps -- [OK] JWT token extracted: eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9... &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe Employee logs in with valid credentials&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.e2e.steps.ConsolidatedE2ESteps.theEmployeeLogsInWithValidCredentials()&amp#27;[0m 01:45:37.386 [main] INFO com.example.e2e.steps.ConsolidatedE2ESteps -- Precondition: pending request id=2 &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe Employee has a pending leave request from &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"future date"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m to &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"future date"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.e2e.steps.ConsolidatedE2ESteps.theEmployeeHasAPendingLeaveRequestFromStringToString(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m 01:45:37.403 [main] INFO com.example.e2e.steps.ConsolidatedE2ESteps -- [OK] POST /api/leave-requests/create (overlapping) -> HTTP 400 &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe Employee submits another leave request overlapping the existing one&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.e2e.steps.ConsolidatedE2ESteps.theEmployeeSubmitsAnotherLeaveRequestOverlappingTheExistingOne()&amp#27;[0m 01:45:37.408 [main] INFO com.example.e2e.steps.ConsolidatedE2ESteps -- Error HTTP 400: Le type de période (Jour/Matin/Heure) est obligatoire. &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe system displays the error &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"Leave request overlaps with an existing request"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.e2e.steps.ConsolidatedE2ESteps.theSystemDisplaysTheErrorString(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m

testcase.name: Employee submits with insufficient balance
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Employee submits with insufficient balance &amp#27;[90m# features/auth-leave_01_leave-request-lifecycle_20260326_014505.feature:23&amp#27;[0m 01:45:37.505 [main] INFO com.example.e2e.steps.ConsolidatedE2ESteps -- [OK] POST /api/auth/login -> HTTP 200 01:45:37.513 [main] INFO com.example.e2e.steps.ConsolidatedE2ESteps -- [OK] JWT token extracted: eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9... &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe Employee logs in with valid credentials&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.e2e.steps.ConsolidatedE2ESteps.theEmployeeLogsInWithValidCredentials()&amp#27;[0m 01:45:37.513 [main] INFO com.example.e2e.steps.ConsolidatedE2ESteps -- Precondition: zero-day leave request &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe Employee has zero balance&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.e2e.steps.ConsolidatedE2ESteps.theEmployeeHasZeroBalance()&amp#27;[0m 01:45:37.543 [main] INFO com.example.e2e.steps.ConsolidatedE2ESteps -- [OK] POST /api/leave-requests/create (future date -> future date) -> HTTP 400 &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe Employee submits an annual leave request from &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"future date"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m to &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"future date"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.e2e.steps.ConsolidatedE2ESteps.theEmployeeSubmitsAnAnnualLeaveRequestFromStringToString(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m 01:45:37.544 [main] INFO com.example.e2e.steps.ConsolidatedE2ESteps -- Error HTTP 400: {"timestamp":"2026-03-26","status":400,"error":"Bad Request","path":"/api/leave-requests/create"} &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe system displays the error &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"Insufficient balance"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.e2e.steps.ConsolidatedE2ESteps.theSystemDisplaysTheErrorString(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m

testcase.name: Employee submits without respecting notice period (48 hours)
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Employee submits without respecting notice period (48 hours) &amp#27;[90m# features/auth-leave_01_leave-request-lifecycle_20260326_014505.feature:28&amp#27;[0m 01:45:37.646 [main] INFO com.example.e2e.steps.ConsolidatedE2ESteps -- [OK] POST /api/auth/login -> HTTP 200 01:45:37.657 [main] INFO com.example.e2e.steps.ConsolidatedE2ESteps -- [OK] JWT token extracted: eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9... &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe Employee logs in with valid credentials&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.e2e.steps.ConsolidatedE2ESteps.theEmployeeLogsInWithValidCredentials()&amp#27;[0m 01:45:37.657 [main] INFO com.example.e2e.steps.ConsolidatedE2ESteps -- Precondition: sufficient leave balance (30+ days available) &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe Employee has sufficient leave balance&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.e2e.steps.ConsolidatedE2ESteps.theEmployeeHasSufficientLeaveBalance()&amp#27;[0m 01:45:37.694 [main] INFO com.example.e2e.steps.ConsolidatedE2ESteps -- [OK] POST /api/leave-requests/create (48-hour notice) -> HTTP 500 &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe Employee submits a leave request starting within &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m48&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m hours&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.e2e.steps.ConsolidatedE2ESteps.theEmployeeSubmitsALeaveRequestStartingWithinIntHours(int)&amp#27;[0m 01:45:37.696 [main] INFO com.example.e2e.steps.ConsolidatedE2ESteps -- Error HTTP 500: {"timestamp":"2026-03-26","status":500,"error":"Internal Server Error","path":"/api/leave-requests/create"} &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe system displays the error &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"Notice period must be respected"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.e2e.steps.ConsolidatedE2ESteps.theSystemDisplaysTheErrorString(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m

testcase.name: Unauthorized employee attempts to create request
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Unauthorized employee attempts to create request &amp#27;[90m# features/auth-leave_01_leave-request-lifecycle_20260326_014505.feature:33&amp#27;[0m 01:45:37.783 [main] INFO com.example.e2e.steps.ConsolidatedE2ESteps -- [OK] POST /api/auth/login -> HTTP 200 01:45:37.791 [main] INFO com.example.e2e.steps.ConsolidatedE2ESteps -- [OK] JWT token extracted: eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9... &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe Employee logs in with valid credentials&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.e2e.steps.ConsolidatedE2ESteps.theEmployeeLogsInWithValidCredentials()&amp#27;[0m 01:45:37.792 [main] INFO com.example.e2e.steps.ConsolidatedE2ESteps -- Precondition: employee is not logged in &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe Employee is not logged in&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.e2e.steps.ConsolidatedE2ESteps.theEmployeeIsNotLoggedIn()&amp#27;[0m 01:45:37.809 [main] INFO com.example.e2e.steps.ConsolidatedE2ESteps -- Submitting leave request: 2026-10-01 -> 2026-10-05 01:45:37.871 [main] INFO com.example.e2e.steps.ConsolidatedE2ESteps -- [OK] POST /api/leave-requests/create (2026-10-01 -> 2026-10-05) -> HTTP 500 &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe Employee attempts to submit a leave request&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.e2e.steps.ConsolidatedE2ESteps.theEmployeeAttemptsToSubmitALeaveRequest()&amp#27;[0m 01:45:37.872 [main] INFO com.example.e2e.steps.ConsolidatedE2ESteps -- Blocked HTTP 500 &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe system blocks the action&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.e2e.steps.ConsolidatedE2ESteps.theSystemBlocksTheAction()&amp#27;[0m

testcase.name: Employee submits with different reasons
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Employee submits with different reasons &amp#27;[90m# features/auth-leave_01_leave-request-lifecycle_20260326_014505.feature:91&amp#27;[0m 01:45:39.849 [main] INFO com.example.e2e.steps.ConsolidatedE2ESteps -- [OK] POST /api/auth/login -> HTTP 200 01:45:39.856 [main] INFO com.example.e2e.steps.ConsolidatedE2ESteps -- [OK] JWT token extracted: eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9... &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe Employee logs in with valid credentials&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.e2e.steps.ConsolidatedE2ESteps.theEmployeeLogsInWithValidCredentials()&amp#27;[0m 01:45:39.856 [main] INFO com.example.e2e.steps.ConsolidatedE2ESteps -- Precondition: sufficient leave balance (30+ days available) &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe Employee has sufficient leave balance&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.e2e.steps.ConsolidatedE2ESteps.theEmployeeHasSufficientLeaveBalance()&amp#27;[0m 01:45:39.869 [main] INFO com.example.e2e.steps.ConsolidatedE2ESteps -- Submitting leave request: 2026-09-01 -> 2026-09-05 01:45:39.902 [main] INFO com.example.e2e.steps.ConsolidatedE2ESteps -- [OK] POST /api/leave-requests/create (2026-09-01 -> 2026-09-05) -> HTTP 500 &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe Employee submits a leave request with reason &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"value"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.e2e.steps.ConsolidatedE2ESteps.theEmployeeSubmitsALeaveRequestWithReasonString(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m 01:45:39.903 [main] WARN com.example.e2e.steps.ConsolidatedE2ESteps -- [SKIP] Unhandled Then step: the leave request reason is "value" &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe leave request reason is &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"value"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.e2e.steps.ConsolidatedE2ESteps.theLeaveRequestReasonIsString(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m

testcase.name: Example #1.1
testcase.system-out: Scenario Outline: Employee submits with different leave types &amp#27;[90m# features/auth-leave_01_leave-request-lifecycle_20260326_014505.feature:45&amp#27;[0m 01:45:37.960 [main] INFO com.example.e2e.steps.ConsolidatedE2ESteps -- [OK] POST /api/auth/login -> HTTP 200 01:45:37.967 [main] INFO com.example.e2e.steps.ConsolidatedE2ESteps -- [OK] JWT token extracted: eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9... &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe Employee logs in with valid credentials&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.e2e.steps.ConsolidatedE2ESteps.theEmployeeLogsInWithValidCredentials()&amp#27;[0m 01:45:37.968 [main] INFO com.example.e2e.steps.ConsolidatedE2ESteps -- Precondition: sufficient leave balance (30+ days available) &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe Employee has sufficient leave balance&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.e2e.steps.ConsolidatedE2ESteps.theEmployeeHasSufficientLeaveBalance()&amp#27;[0m 01:45:37.980 [main] INFO com.example.e2e.steps.ConsolidatedE2ESteps -- Submitting leave request: 2026-01-01 -> 2026-01-05 01:45:38.007 [main] INFO com.example.e2e.steps.ConsolidatedE2ESteps -- [OK] POST /api/leave-requests/create (2026-01-01 -> 2026-01-05) -> HTTP 500 &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe Employee submits a leave request of type &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"ANNUAL_LEAVE"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.e2e.steps.ConsolidatedE2ESteps.theEmployeeSubmitsALeaveRequestOfTypeString(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m 01:45:38.008 [main] WARN com.example.e2e.steps.ConsolidatedE2ESteps -- [SKIP] Unhandled Then step: the leave request type is "<leaveType>" &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe leave request type is &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"ANNUAL_LEAVE"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.e2e.steps.ConsolidatedE2ESteps.theLeaveRequestTypeIsString(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m

testcase.name: Example #1.1
testcase.system-out: Scenario Outline: Employee submits with different period types &amp#27;[90m# features/auth-leave_01_leave-request-lifecycle_20260326_014505.feature:57&amp#27;[0m 01:45:38.490 [main] INFO com.example.e2e.steps.ConsolidatedE2ESteps -- [OK] POST /api/auth/login -> HTTP 200 01:45:38.499 [main] INFO com.example.e2e.steps.ConsolidatedE2ESteps -- [OK] JWT token extracted: eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9... &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe Employee logs in with valid credentials&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.e2e.steps.ConsolidatedE2ESteps.theEmployeeLogsInWithValidCredentials()&amp#27;[0m 01:45:38.500 [main] INFO com.example.e2e.steps.ConsolidatedE2ESteps -- Precondition: sufficient leave balance (30+ days available) &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe Employee has sufficient leave balance&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.e2e.steps.ConsolidatedE2ESteps.theEmployeeHasSufficientLeaveBalance()&amp#27;[0m 01:45:38.515 [main] INFO com.example.e2e.steps.ConsolidatedE2ESteps -- Submitting leave request: 2026-06-01 -> 2026-06-05 01:45:38.544 [main] INFO com.example.e2e.steps.ConsolidatedE2ESteps -- [OK] POST /api/leave-requests/create (2026-06-01 -> 2026-06-05) -> HTTP 500 &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe Employee submits a leave request with period type &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"JOURNEE_COMPLETE"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.e2e.steps.ConsolidatedE2ESteps.theEmployeeSubmitsALeaveRequestWithPeriodTypeString(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m 01:45:38.545 [main] WARN com.example.e2e.steps.ConsolidatedE2ESteps -- [SKIP] Unhandled Then step: the leave request period type is "<periodType>" &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe leave request period type is &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"JOURNEE_COMPLETE"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.e2e.steps.ConsolidatedE2ESteps.theLeaveRequestPeriodTypeIsString(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m

testcase.name: Example #1.1

testcase.name: Example #1.1
testcase.system-out: Scenario Outline: Employee submits with different continuous days &amp#27;[90m# features/auth-leave_01_leave-request-lifecycle_20260326_014505.feature:89&amp#27;[0m 01:45:39.695 [main] INFO com.example.e2e.steps.ConsolidatedE2ESteps -- [OK] POST /api/auth/login -> HTTP 200 01:45:39.702 [main] INFO com.example.e2e.steps.ConsolidatedE2ESteps -- [OK] JWT token extracted: eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9... &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe Employee logs in with valid credentials&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.e2e.steps.ConsolidatedE2ESteps.theEmployeeLogsInWithValidCredentials()&amp#27;[0m 01:45:39.702 [main] INFO com.example.e2e.steps.ConsolidatedE2ESteps -- Precondition: sufficient leave balance (30+ days available) &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe Employee has sufficient leave balance&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.e2e.steps.ConsolidatedE2ESteps.theEmployeeHasSufficientLeaveBalance()&amp#27;[0m 01:45:39.765 [main] INFO com.example.e2e.steps.ConsolidatedE2ESteps -- [OK] POST /api/leave-requests/create (exceeding max) -> HTTP 500 &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe Employee submits a leave request exceeding maximum continuous days allowed&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.e2e.steps.ConsolidatedE2ESteps.theEmployeeSubmitsALeaveRequestExceedingMaximumContinuousDaysAllowed()&amp#27;[0m 01:45:39.766 [main] INFO com.example.e2e.steps.ConsolidatedE2ESteps -- Error HTTP 500: {"timestamp":"2026-03-26","status":500,"error":"Internal Server Error","path":"/api/leave-requests/create"} &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe system displays the error &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"Request exceeds maximum continuous days"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.e2e.steps.ConsolidatedE2ESteps.theSystemDisplaysTheErrorString(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m

testcase.system-out: Scenario Outline: Employee submits with different leave types &amp#27;[90m# features/auth-leave_01_leave-request-lifecycle_20260326_014505.feature:48&amp#27;[0m 01:45:38.362 [main] INFO com.example.e2e.steps.ConsolidatedE2ESteps -- [OK] POST /api/auth/login -> HTTP 200 01:45:38.370 [main] INFO com.example.e2e.steps.ConsolidatedE2ESteps -- [OK] JWT token extracted: eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9... &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe Employee logs in with valid credentials&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.e2e.steps.ConsolidatedE2ESteps.theEmployeeLogsInWithValidCredentials()&amp#27;[0m 01:45:38.370 [main] INFO com.example.e2e.steps.ConsolidatedE2ESteps -- Precondition: sufficient leave balance (30+ days available) &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe Employee has sufficient leave balance&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.e2e.steps.ConsolidatedE2ESteps.theEmployeeHasSufficientLeaveBalance()&amp#27;[0m 01:45:38.383 [main] INFO com.example.e2e.steps.ConsolidatedE2ESteps -- Submitting leave request: 2026-03-01 -> 2026-03-05 01:45:38.410 [main] INFO com.example.e2e.steps.ConsolidatedE2ESteps -- [OK] POST /api/leave-requests/create (2026-03-01 -> 2026-03-05) -> HTTP 500 &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe Employee submits a leave request of type &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"AUTHORIZED_ABSENCE"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.e2e.steps.ConsolidatedE2ESteps.theEmployeeSubmitsALeaveRequestOfTypeString(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m 01:45:38.412 [main] WARN com.example.e2e.steps.ConsolidatedE2ESteps -- [SKIP] Unhandled Then step: the leave request type is "<leaveType>" &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe leave request type is &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"AUTHORIZED_ABSENCE"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.e2e.steps.ConsolidatedE2ESteps.theLeaveRequestTypeIsString(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m

testcase.name: Example #1.4
testcase.system-out: Scenario Outline: Employee submits with different period types &amp#27;[90m# features/auth-leave_01_leave-request-lifecycle_20260326_014505.feature:60&amp#27;[0m 01:45:38.880 [main] INFO com.example.e2e.steps.ConsolidatedE2ESteps -- [OK] POST /api/auth/login -> HTTP 200 01:45:38.892 [main] INFO com.example.e2e.steps.ConsolidatedE2ESteps -- [OK] JWT token extracted: eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9... &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe Employee logs in with valid credentials&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.e2e.steps.ConsolidatedE2ESteps.theEmployeeLogsInWithValidCredentials()&amp#27;[0m 01:45:38.894 [main] INFO com.example.e2e.steps.ConsolidatedE2ESteps -- Precondition: sufficient leave balance (30+ days available) &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe Employee has sufficient leave balance&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.e2e.steps.ConsolidatedE2ESteps.theEmployeeHasSufficientLeaveBalance()&amp#27;[0m 01:45:38.909 [main] INFO com.example.e2e.steps.ConsolidatedE2ESteps -- Submitting leave request: 2026-10-01 -> 2026-10-05 01:45:38.942 [main] INFO com.example.e2e.steps.ConsolidatedE2ESteps -- [OK] POST /api/leave-requests/create (2026-10-01 -> 2026-10-05) -> HTTP 500 &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe Employee submits a leave request with period type &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"PAR_HEURE"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.e2e.steps.ConsolidatedE2ESteps.theEmployeeSubmitsALeaveRequestWithPeriodTypeString(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m 01:45:38.943 [main] WARN com.example.e2e.steps.ConsolidatedE2ESteps -- [SKIP] Unhandled Then step: the leave request period type is "<periodType>" &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe leave request period type is &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"PAR_HEURE"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.e2e.steps.ConsolidatedE2ESteps.theLeaveRequestPeriodTypeIsString(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m
